title: Garnacha Levantine
description: A low-carb-friendly, energizing Syrian dish featuring garlic-infused snow peas and a refreshing marinate for a delightful snack or light meal.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and sauté for about 1 minute until fragrant but not browned.
Stir in lemon juice, water, and pepper flakes. Mix well.
Gently stir in snow peas and let cook for another 2 minutes or until hot and crisp-tender.
Optional: Garnish with chopped basil leaves before serving.
Serve immediately as a snack or light meal accompaniment.
